shortCompanyReason: Leading international authority on transport technology solutions.
shortRoleReason: Manage OEM automotive projects from concept to delivery.
companySummary: Aurrigo designs, builds and deploys autonomous vehicles across the UK, Europe, Asia-Pacific and North America.
roleSummary: Responsible for leading and coordinating OEM automotive projects, managing schedules, teams, and customer interfaces.
headlineAttraction: Lead cutting-edge autonomous vehicle OEM projects at a global transport innovator.
rolePurpose: To manage and deliver OEM automotive projects to agreed time, quality and cost targets.
advertSummary: Aurrigo seeks a full-time Automotive Project Manager in Coventry to manage OEM vehicle programmes, coordinate engineering and testing, liaise with customers, and ensure project delivery.
coreResponsibilities: Plan and coordinate OEM automotive projects
Manage project delivery and implementation phases
Coordinate multi-disciplinary teams across engineering, software and mechanical design
Liaise with customers and facilitate on-site visits
Oversee testing, quality, and supplier activities
Prepare project reports, schedules and budgets
essentialRequirements: Engineering degree with project management qualification
Experience managing complex products and diverse teams
Knowledge of ITIL, Lean, or Sprint methods
preferredRequirements: Experience with low volume or niche transport projects
History of delivering significant automotive projects
impliedStrategicGoals: Support growth in autonomous vehicle market
